extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked on Monte Carpegna climb lap 2, dropped everyone, won solo by nearly 4 minutes despite sketchy descent moments
tactical_patterns: POGACAR isolated early when teammates exhausted before final climb, still attacked solo with overwhelming superiority showing depth mismatch.
VINGEGAARD chastised LANDER for breaking attacks earlier, revealing UAE's rivals lacked cohesion to coordinate sustained pressure on leader.
SIMMONS in green waited to pace CICCONE showing breakaway riders prioritizing team objectives over individual KOM consolidation opportunities.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: attacked isolated without teammates on final Carpegna ascent and extended 4-minute gap despite descent handling issues
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost 3:35 on final climb wearing maglia ciclamino, brutalized on mountains revealing early-season climbing deficit
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: stronger than recent form, led descent aggressively and sprinted for second though 4 minutes down
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: criticized LANDA mid-race for attack disruption but lacked firepower to exploit Pogacar's isolation
rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: lost vital seconds hanging leg on descent, dropped to 4th overall by 11 seconds with limited TT opportunity remaining
